action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 9 crashed immediately with TypeError because RidgeCV received an unexpected keyword argument 'store_cv_values'. No model was trained and no eval occurred. Analysis: The fix is trivial—remove the invalid argument and use sklearn.linear_model.Ridge with a manual alpha grid, which is more robust and version-agnostic. The cached train_val_region_embeddings_v3.pt and the predict.py sklearn-loading logic are already in place; I only need to regenerate the sklearn_model.pt checkpoint. Decision: Rewrite train_sklearn.py with the bug fixed, then run it and submit eval to test whether optimally-regularized Ridge regression improves on the current best test spearman of 0.6735.
